name: STAR GROUP, L.P.
summary: Star Group, L.P. is a home heating oil and propane distributor and service provider to residential and commercial customers in the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic U.S. regions. The company sells home heating oil, propane, gasoline, and diesel fuel, and installs, maintains, and repairs heating and air conditioning equipment. It serves approximately 469,600 full-service and delivery-only customers across 13 states and the District of Columbia, operating under brands including Petro Home Services, Meenan, and Griffith Energy Services.

products.name: Home Heating Oil
products.description: Retail distribution of home heating oil to residential and commercial customers in Northeast and Mid-Atlantic U.S.

products.name: Propane
products.description: Retail distribution of propane for space heating, water heating, cooking, and other applications.

products.name: Gasoline and Diesel Fuel
products.description: Sale of gasoline and diesel fuel to approximately 27,700 customers.

products.name: Heating and Air Conditioning Equipment Services
products.description: Installation, maintenance, and repair of heating and air conditioning equipment, including natural gas systems.

products.name: Price-Protected Pricing Plans
products.description: Offers variable price and price-protected options (fixed or capped price) for residential home heating oil customers.

products.name: Smart Pay Budget Payment Plan
products.description: Monthly installment payment plan covering estimated annual oil, propane, and service billings for residential customers.
